source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/11_Clinical Evaluation/Clinical Image Report/003_Clinical Image Report - G1417CW.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical image comparison report for G1417CW against A1417MCW plain radiographic images.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical evaluation of radiographic image quality and diagnostic value for the subject device.
keyPoints: Objective device is G1417CW by H&abyz; comparative equipment is A1417MCW made by H&Abyz.
Output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used for downloading and analysis.
Thirty anatomical radiographic views were evaluated using S, A, B, C grading.
Total average score was 3.98 for A1417MCW and 3.98 for G1417CW.
Conclusion states that G1417CW seems to be more of a diagnostic value.
Clinical evaluation was conducted by Dr. Wonho Chang, described as a board-certified radiologist.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal CE/MDR appears only in metadata.
Document date is ambiguous because Rev. Date Dec/22/2022 appears throughout, while preparation, review, and approval dates are May/16/2025 and clinical image dates are Feb-11-2025 and Mar-06-2025.
Knee AP section names F1417MCW instead of G1417CW, conflicting with the document title and other sections.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings such as DCIOM, Insperction, Sternal Angel, and malformed grade entries such as SS.
No CE/MDR regulation, notified body, certificate, or competent authority text is present in the extracted source.
